title: Salaries computed from taking of oath
doc_html:
§693.  Salaries computed from taking of oath

The salaries of district judges shall be allowed to them from the date they are qualified by taking the oath prescribed in the constitution.
doc_text:
§693.  Salaries computed from taking of oath
